ModMetaData.name: Pawn Diary
ModMetaData.author: aimmlegate
ModMetaData.description:
Pawn Diary gives each RimWorld colonist a private journal.
It watches meaningful colony moments - social interactions, fights, mental breaks, raids, medicine, work, crafting, arrivals, deaths, and end-of-day reflections - and turns them into short diary pages in each pawn's voice.
Entries appear in a per-colonist Diary tab. Two-pawn events can create paired points of view, so both colonists can remember the same moment differently.
Storytelling only: it does not change gameplay. Safe to add to an existing save; removing it stops diary capture and hides the Diary UI/history.
